mapper.insert: INSERT INTO option_master (option_name, option_category, option_target, option_price) VALUES (#{optionName}, #{optionCategory}, #{optionTarget}, #{optionPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM option_master ORDER BY option_category
mapper.update:
UPDATE option_master
option_name = #{optionName},
option_category = #{optionCategory},
option_target = #{optionTarget},
option_price = #{optionPrice},
WHERE option_id = #{optionId}
